{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = UNKNOWN ARTIFACT
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[UNKNOWN ARTIFACT]] originated from [[Planet Murrok]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c31">''The Engineer'', chapter 31</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[UNKNOWN ARTIFACT]] is an obsidian jewel that shifts its configuration.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c31" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
